argument: If it rains, the street gets wet. The street is wet, therefore it rained.
All cats are animals. Whiskers is a cat. Therefore, Whiskers is an animal.
You can't trust Dr. Lee's research on nutrition — she's overweight herself.
If the alarm sounds, there is a fire. There is no fire. Therefore, the alarm did not sound.
We should ban all cars because car accidents kill people.
Every time I wash my car, it rains. Washing my car causes rain.
All squares are rectangles. All rectangles have four sides. Therefore, all squares have four sides.
Millions of people believe in astrology, so there must be something to it.
If we allow students to redo one test, soon they'll want to redo every test, then every assignment, then we'll just hand out degrees.
No reptiles have fur. All snakes are reptiles. Therefore, no snakes have fur.
This new diet pill works — a famous actor endorses it.
Either you support the new policy completely, or you're against progress.
All mammals are warm-blooded. Whales are mammals. Therefore, whales are warm-blooded.
The senator argues for tax reform, but he himself doesn't pay his taxes on time. His argument is invalid.
If P implies Q, and Q implies R, then P implies R.
We've never found evidence of life on Mars. Therefore, there is no life on Mars.
Some students are athletes. Some athletes are scholars. Therefore, some students are scholars.
No fish can fly. A salmon is a fish. Therefore, a salmon cannot fly.
My opponent wants to reduce military spending. Clearly, they don't care about national security at all.
If something is illegal, then it is immoral. Jaywalking is illegal. Therefore, jaywalking is immoral.
Studies show correlation between ice cream sales and drowning rates. Therefore, ice cream causes drowning.
The theory of evolution must be wrong because some scientists disagree about the specific mechanisms.
All integers are rational numbers. All rational numbers are real numbers. Therefore, all integers are real numbers.
If the economy improves, unemployment drops. Unemployment dropped. Therefore, the economy improved.
This encryption algorithm is secure because no one has broken it yet.
If A then B. If B then C. A is true. Therefore C is true.
People who read more live longer. Therefore, reading extends your lifespan.
If not-P then not-Q. Q is true. Therefore P is true.
Natural remedies are always safer than synthetic medication because they come from nature.
If all dogs are loyal, and Rex is a dog, then Rex is loyal. Rex is not loyal. Therefore, not all dogs are loyal.
